notes: E5d spans two frontend apps: (1) Tenant Knowledge Management UI at :5110 route /ai/admin/knowledge (Story E5d-5, 5-tab interface) and (2) Platform Intelligence Dashboard at :5112 route /intelligence (Story E5d-6). Stories E5d-1 to E5d-3 are backend-only. Story E5d-4 provides platform knowledge distribution endpoints consumed by E5d-5's Suggested tab. Auth: tenant app uses standard JWT (admin role required); platform-admin uses Platform JWT (PLATFORM_ADMIN role). Both apps follow Concept D design system.

journeys.name: Journey 1: Knowledge Management Page Shell & Navigation
journeys.description: Verify the Knowledge Management page loads correctly with breadcrumb, 5 tabs, stats panel, sidebar nav item, and deep-linking via URL hash for all tabs

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Management page loads with full page shell
steps.visual_check: Page shows 'AI Administration > Knowledge Management' breadcrumb, title 'Knowledge Management', 5 tabs visible (Knowledge Articles, Training Examples, Corrections, Suggested, Settings), stats panel with 4 KPI cards above tabs, purple #f4f2ff background, Knowledge Articles tab active by default

steps.target: Sidebar navigation - Knowledge item under AI Administration section
steps.expected_result: Knowledge nav item visible in sidebar with BookOpen icon under AI Administration group
4 KPI cards visible showing: Total Articles (with source breakdown bar), Pending Reviews (clickable), Active Articles, AI-Generated Articles
steps.visual_check: 4 KPI cards in horizontal row, rounded-xl styling with custom shadow, JetBrains Mono numbers, staggered fade-in-up animation

steps.expected_result: Training Examples tab becomes active, URL hash changes to #training
steps.visual_check: Training Examples tab has active purple indicator, tab content area shows training example cards or empty state

steps.expected_result: Corrections tab becomes active, URL hash changes to #corrections
Suggested tab becomes active, URL hash changes to #suggested
Settings tab becomes active, URL hash changes to #settings
Page loads with Corrections tab pre-selected via deep-link
steps.visual_check: Corrections tab is active with purple indicator, corrections content visible including stats row with 4 KPI cards (Total Corrections, Last 30 Days with trend, By Type segmented bar, Auto-resolved count)

journeys.name: Journey 2: Knowledge Articles Tab — List View & Category Grouping
journeys.description: Verify the Knowledge Articles tab displays articles grouped by category accordion with correct badges, confidence indicators, and metadata

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads with articles grouped by category
Articles grouped under collapsible category headers: Business Processes, Terminology, Industry Rules, Custom Fields, Historical Patterns
steps.visual_check: Accordion sections visible with category names as headers, each section expandable/collapsible, articles rendered as cards within each category group

steps.target: Article card details for a sample article
steps.expected_result: Article card shows: title (line-clamp-2), source badge (Admin/AI-Generated/Platform/Correction), confidence indicator (green/amber/red dot with percentage), active toggle switch, chunk count, usage count, last used timestamp

steps.target: Needs Review badge on unconfirmed articles
steps.expected_result: Unconfirmed articles (isConfirmed=false) show a 'Needs Review' badge alongside the source badge
Create Article button and Upload Document button visible in the tab action area

journeys.name: Journey 3: Knowledge Articles — Filtering & Search
journeys.description: Test the filter bar with category, source, active status, and title search filters

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads with filter bar visible
Category multi-select popover opens showing all 5 categories as checkboxes
Filter applied — only Terminology articles visible, other category groups hidden
steps.visual_check: Only Terminology category group visible, filter badge shows '1' selected category, article count updated

steps.expected_result: Source multi-select popover opens showing: Admin Uploaded, AI Generated, Platform Suggested, Correction Derived

steps.target: AI Generated checkbox in source filter
steps.expected_result: Filter applied — only AI-Generated articles within Terminology category shown
Toggle switches to show only inactive (soft-deleted) articles
After 300ms debounce, articles filtered to those with 'VAT' in the title
steps.visual_check: Search input shows 'VAT', filtered results visible, matching articles highlighted

steps.expected_result: All filters reset — all categories, all sources, active toggle reset, search cleared, full article list restored

journeys.name: Journey 4: Create Knowledge Article via Dialog
journeys.description: Test creating a new knowledge article through the Create Article dialog with title, content, and category selection

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads
Article form dialog opens in Create mode
steps.visual_check: Modal dialog visible with title 'Create Knowledge Article', form fields: Title input, Content textarea, Category select dropdown, Save/Cancel buttons

input_data.title: EU Reverse Charge VAT Rules
input_data.content: When purchasing from EU suppliers, our company uses reverse charge mechanism. Use VAT code 3 for all EU purchases. This applies to both goods and services from EU member states.

steps.expected_result: Form fields populated with the provided data

steps.target: Save button in article form dialog
steps.expected_result: Article created successfully, dialog closes, new article appears in the Terminology category group
steps.visual_check: Success toast visible ('Knowledge article created'), new article card visible under Terminology group with title 'EU Reverse Charge VAT Rules', source badge 'Admin Uploaded', confidence 100%, stats panel total articles count incremented

journeys.name: Journey 5: Upload Document Flow
journeys.description: Test the document upload dialog for uploading text/markdown/PDF files that get chunked and embedded

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads
Upload document dialog opens with drag-drop zone and file browser
steps.visual_check: Upload dialog visible with drag-drop area, file type hints (PDF, Markdown, Text), category selector, upload button

steps.expected_result: File selected, category chosen, processing begins
Upload completes, document processed (chunked and embedded), dialog closes, new article appears in Business Processes group
steps.visual_check: Success toast visible, new article card appears under Business Processes with source badge 'Admin Uploaded', chunk count shown in metadata

journeys.name: Journey 6: Edit Knowledge Article
journeys.description: Test editing an existing knowledge article's title, content, and category through the overflow menu

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads with existing articles

steps.target: Overflow menu (three-dot) on the first article card
steps.expected_result: Dropdown menu appears with Edit, Confirm (if unconfirmed), Delete options
Article form dialog opens in Edit mode, pre-filled with existing article data
steps.visual_check: Dialog title shows 'Edit Knowledge Article', Title/Content/Category fields pre-populated with current values

input_data.content: Updated content: When purchasing from EU suppliers after Brexit transition, use reverse charge mechanism. VAT code 3 applies to all EU purchases of goods and services.

steps.expected_result: Content field updated with new text

steps.target: Save button in article form dialog
steps.expected_result: Article updated successfully, dialog closes, article card reflects updated content
steps.visual_check: Success toast visible ('Knowledge article updated'), article card shows updated content preview, re-chunking triggered (chunk count may change)

journeys.name: Journey 7: Confirm Unconfirmed AI-Generated Article
journeys.description: Test confirming an auto-generated knowledge article, which upgrades its confidence score from 0.5 to 0.8

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads
At least one article shows 'Needs Review' badge and AI-Generated or Correction Derived source badge with confidence < 80%

steps.target: Overflow menu on unconfirmed article, then Confirm option
steps.expected_result: Article confirmed — 'Needs Review' badge disappears, confidence score upgrades to 80%
steps.visual_check: Article card no longer shows 'Needs Review' badge, confidence indicator changes from red/amber to amber/green (80%), success toast visible

journeys.name: Journey 8: Soft-Delete Knowledge Article
journeys.description: Test soft-deleting a knowledge article via the overflow menu, which deactivates it

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads with articles

steps.target: Overflow menu on an article, then Delete option
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog appears asking 'Deactivate Knowledge Article?'
Article soft-deleted (deactivated), removed from active list
steps.visual_check: Article removed from the visible list, toast notification shows deletion with potential undo option, article count in stats panel decremented

journeys.name: Journey 9: Toggle Article Active/Inactive Status
journeys.description: Test toggling an article's active status via the inline switch on the article card

steps.expected_result: Knowledge Articles tab loads

steps.target: Active toggle switch on an article card
steps.expected_result: Toggle flips to inactive, article visually dimmed or marked inactive

steps.target: Active toggle switch on same article (re-activate)
steps.expected_result: Toggle flips back to active, article restored to normal appearance

steps.visual_check: Training examples displayed as cards with 'When user asks:' input and 'AI should answer:' output sections, skill key badge, category badge, source badge, Test button (disabled/coming soon), active toggle

input_data.inputText: What VAT code should I use for EU purchases?

steps.expected_result: All form fields populated

steps.target: Save button in training example form
steps.expected_result: Training example created, dialog closes, new card appears in the list

steps.target: Overflow menu on the newly created example, then Edit

input_data.outputText: Use reverse charge — VAT code 3 for goods, VAT code 3A for services. This applies to all EU member state purchases after 2024.

steps.expected_result: Output text field updated

steps.target: Save button in training example form
steps.expected_result: Training example updated, dialog closes, card reflects updated output text
steps.visual_check: Success toast, updated output text visible on the card

steps.target: Overflow menu on the example, then Delete
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog appears
Training example soft-deleted, removed from list
steps.visual_check: Card removed from the list with optimistic update, success toast visible

Below: corrections grouped by type in collapsible accordion sections (TERMINOLOGY purple, PROCESS blue, DATA green, PREFERENCE amber, OTHER gray)

steps.target: Expand/collapse a correction type group accordion

Corrections filtered to those involving the create_invoice skill

journeys.name: Journey 15: Suggested Knowledge — Accept Platform Suggestion
journeys.description: Test accepting a vendor-suggested knowledge article, which creates a local copy with PLATFORM_SUGGESTED source and confidence 0.9

steps.expected_result: Suggested tab loads showing platform-suggested articles
steps.visual_check: Suggested articles displayed as cards with: title, platform category badge (BEST_PRACTICE/HELP/DEFAULT_CONFIG/SKILL_UPDATE), version number, published date, content preview with 'Read more/Show less', Accept (green), Edit & Accept, Reject (red) buttons

steps.target: Read more button on a suggested article to expand preview
steps.expected_result: Full content of the suggested article revealed

steps.target: Accept button on the suggested article
steps.expected_result: Article accepted — local copy created in tenant knowledge base, card slides out from suggested list
steps.visual_check: Success toast ('Suggestion accepted — article added to your knowledge base'), the accepted article disappears from the Suggested tab list. Navigate to Articles tab to verify new article with source 'Platform Suggested' and confidence 90%

journeys.description: Test rejecting a platform-suggested article, which hides it from the suggested list for this version

steps.expected_result: Suggested tab loads with platform suggestions

steps.target: Reject button on a suggested article
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog appears asking to confirm rejection
Article rejected, slides out from suggested list
steps.visual_check: Card removed from suggestions with slide-out animation, toast confirms rejection, article will not reappear unless vendor publishes a new version

journeys.name: Journey 17: Suggested Knowledge — Edit & Accept with Category Remap
journeys.description: Test the Edit & Accept flow where admin modifies content and category before accepting a platform suggestion

steps.expected_result: Suggested tab loads

steps.target: Edit & Accept button on a suggested article
steps.expected_result: Edit form dialog opens pre-filled with platform article content, category remapped from platform to tenant taxonomy
steps.visual_check: Form dialog shows editable title, content, and category fields. Platform category (e.g., BEST_PRACTICE) remapped to tenant category (e.g., BUSINESS_PROCESS). User can modify all fields

steps.target: Edit form - modify content and category

input_data.content: Customised version: Our company follows this best practice with the following modifications...

steps.expected_result: Content and category updated in the form
Modified article accepted and saved to tenant knowledge base
steps.visual_check: Success toast, card removed from Suggested tab. New article in Articles tab has customised content, category 'Industry Rules', source 'Platform Suggested', confidence 90%

journeys.name: Journey 18: Suggested Tab — Empty & Platform Unavailable States
journeys.description: Verify graceful degradation when no suggestions exist or platform is not configured

steps.expected_result: Suggested tab loads
steps.visual_check: If no suggestions: empty state message 'You're all caught up — no pending suggestions'. If platform not configured: info message explaining platform connection not available. No error state shown

journeys.name: Journey 19: Settings Tab — Configuration, Save, Dirty Guard
journeys.description: Test the Settings tab with knowledge configuration switches, retention, RAG budget, save/reset, and dirty state warning

steps.expected_result: Settings tab loads with configuration form
steps.visual_check: T7 settings layout with 2-column desktop (label + control): Enable AI Knowledge Base switch, Share Anonymised Patterns switch, Knowledge Categories checkbox list, Auto-generated Article Retention days input (30-365), RAG Token Budget slider (500-2000). Save Settings button (disabled/clean), Reset to Defaults button (ghost)

steps.expected_result: Toggle changes state, Save Settings button becomes enabled (dirty state)
Retention days updated to 180
RAG token budget slider moved to 1500, number display updates
steps.visual_check: Dirty state warning banner visible at top of settings, Save Settings button is primary/enabled, form shows modified values

steps.expected_result: Settings saved, dirty state cleared, Save button disabled again
steps.visual_check: Success toast ('Settings saved'), dirty warning banner gone, Save button disabled, form values persisted

steps.expected_result: All settings reset to defaults: knowledge enabled, sharing enabled, all categories checked, retention 90 days, RAG budget 1000 tokens
steps.visual_check: Form fields reset to default values, dirty state appears (since we're now different from saved values)

JetBrains Mono numbers, 12px radius cards with custom shadow, #f4f2ff background

If data is loading, skeleton card placeholders match the final layout shape for each KPI card

journeys.description: Test the three insight-based sections showing feature gaps, workflow patterns, and default configuration candidates with severity badges and status actions

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads, scroll to Feature Gaps section
Section shows top feature gap insights with: title, module category, tenant count, frequency, severity badge (HIGH red/MEDIUM amber/LOW green)
steps.visual_check: Feature Gaps section card with header 'Feature Gaps' and subtitle, insight entries with severity badges, bar chart visualization grouped by module, 'View All' link if >10 items

steps.target: Status dropdown on a feature gap insight — change to REVIEWED
steps.expected_result: Insight status updated to REVIEWED, status badge changes
steps.visual_check: Status dropdown shows REVIEWED selected, badge colour/text updated, optimistic update reflected immediately

steps.expected_result: Section shows detected manual patterns across tenants with: pattern description, tenant count, frequency, action dropdown (Review, Dismiss, Create Automation Suggestion)
steps.visual_check: Workflow Opportunities section with entries showing tenant percentage and count, action dropdown visible per entry

steps.expected_result: Section shows configurations >60% of tenants create manually with: description, adoption percentage progress bar, tenant count, 'Make Default' action button
steps.visual_check: Default Optimisation section with adoption percentage shown as filled progress bar (e.g., 72% filled), grouped by module, Make Default button visible

steps.target: Make Default button on a default optimisation insight
steps.expected_result: Insight status transitions to ACTIONED
steps.visual_check: Insight card shows ACTIONED status after clicking Make Default, toast confirmation visible

journeys.name: Journey 23: Platform Dashboard — Skill Effectiveness Table
journeys.description: Test the sortable, filterable skill effectiveness table with colour-coded metrics, trend indicators, module filter, and pagination

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads, scroll to Skill Effectiveness section
Table visible with columns: Skill Name (monospace), Module, Avg Success Rate (%), Avg Correction Rate (%), Usage Count, Tenant Count, Confidence, Trend
steps.visual_check: Table with proper header semantics, success rate cells colour-coded (green >80%, amber 50-80%, red <50%), trend column shows icons (↑ green/→ amber/↓ red), correction rate >30% highlighted with warning, JetBrains Mono for numbers, percentages show 1 decimal place

steps.expected_result: Table sorted by success rate (ascending first click), arrow indicator visible on column header

steps.target: Avg Success Rate column header again
steps.expected_result: Table sorted by success rate descending, arrow indicator flipped
steps.visual_check: Table rows reordered with highest success rate first, sort direction arrow visible on the column header, aria-sort attribute updated

steps.expected_result: Table filtered to show only Finance-module skills
steps.visual_check: Dropdown shows 'Finance' selected, table rows filtered to finance-related skills only

steps.expected_result: Pagination shows page info and Next/Previous buttons (20 rows per page)

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads, scroll to Industry Breakdown section
Section shows industry selector dropdown with options: All, Construction, Retail, Manufacturing, Professional Services, Other
steps.visual_check: Industry Breakdown section with dropdown selector, sub-panels showing: top query categories, most-used skills, common correction types, tenant count for the selected industry

steps.expected_result: Data updates to show construction industry patterns without full page reload

steps.expected_result: Section shows corrections grouped by category tabs: TERMINOLOGY, PROCESS, DATA, PREFERENCE. Each pattern shows: correction type badge, skill key, occurrence count, tenant count, anonymised correction text
steps.visual_check: Correction Patterns section with category tabs, pattern cards with coloured type badges, skill filter dropdown above, 'Create Knowledge Article' button on each pattern

steps.target: Skill filter dropdown in Correction Patterns, select a specific skill
steps.expected_result: Corrections filtered to show only patterns involving the selected skill

steps.target: Create Knowledge Article button on a correction pattern
steps.expected_result: Publish Knowledge side panel opens pre-filled with correction context
steps.visual_check: Side panel slides in from right (480px) with pre-filled title 'AI Correction: {type} — {skill}', content from correction context, Category defaulting to BEST_PRACTICE, Target Industries and Target Plan Tiers multi-selects empty (all)

journeys.name: Journey 25: Platform Dashboard — Publish Knowledge Workflow
journeys.description: Test the full publish knowledge workflow: open panel, fill form, save as draft, then publish to all eligible tenants

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads
Publish Knowledge side panel opens from the right
steps.visual_check: Side panel visible with form fields: Title input, Content textarea, Category selector (BEST_PRACTICE/HELP/DEFAULT_CONFIG/SKILL_UPDATE), Target Industries multi-select chips, Target Plan Tiers multi-select chips, Save & Publish button

input_data.title: Best Practice: EU Reverse Charge VAT Handling
input_data.content: When UK businesses purchase goods or services from EU suppliers, the reverse charge mechanism should be applied. Use the designated reverse charge VAT code rather than standard rate. This applies to both B2B goods and services transactions.

steps.expected_result: All form fields populated with the provided data
Article created and published in one flow
steps.visual_check: Success toast showing 'Knowledge article published — {N} tenants eligible', panel closes, article now available for matching tenants' Suggested Knowledge tab

journeys.name: Journey 26: Platform Dashboard — Trigger Aggregation & Insights Generation
journeys.description: Test the manual trigger buttons for running data aggregation and generating insights, with confirmation dialogs and refresh

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads with data controls bar
Confirmation dialog appears asking to confirm aggregation trigger
Aggregation triggered, spinner shown during processing
steps.visual_check: Loading spinner visible on the Run Aggregation button, 'Last Aggregated' timestamp will update after completion

steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog appears
Insights generation triggered, affected sections auto-refresh after completion
steps.visual_check: Loading state on Generate Insights button, after completion the Feature Gaps, Workflow Opportunities, and Default Optimisation sections refresh with potentially new insights

journeys.name: Journey 27: Tenant Knowledge Management — Responsive Layout
journeys.description: Verify the Knowledge Management page adapts correctly to tablet and mobile viewports with accordion layout for mobile

steps.expected_result: Page renders in tablet layout
steps.visual_check: Stats panel KPI cards in 2-column grid, tabs visible below stats, content stacked in single column, sidebar collapsed or hamburger menu

steps.expected_result: Page renders in mobile layout with accordion tab navigation
steps.visual_check: Stats panel KPI cards stacked vertically, mobile accordion layout for tab content instead of horizontal tabs, sidebar fully collapsed behind hamburger menu, training example cards stacked in single column instead of 2-col grid

journeys.name: Journey 28: Platform Intelligence Dashboard — Responsive Layout
journeys.description: Verify the Platform Intelligence Dashboard adapts to tablet and mobile viewports with collapsible sections on mobile

steps.expected_result: Dashboard renders in tablet layout
